shinyglass 0.1.0

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

shinyglass 0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • glass_theme() returns a bslib theme with Apple-inspired Liquid Glass styling for shiny apps: translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, soft depth, and system typography.
  • Light and dark presets, with options for accent color, blur, saturation, and corner radius.
  • Works with fluidPage(), navbarPage(), bslib::page_sidebar(), and other bslib-aware page functions. Pass the theme via theme = glass_theme(), or for teal apps via options(teal.bs_theme = glass_theme()).
  • Styles common Bootstrap and Shiny surfaces (cards, navbars, sidebars, inputs, tables, plots, modals) and holds up on denser UIs such as leaflet maps, DT, shinyWidgets, bs4Dash, and teal filter panels.

Developed by Eric Anderson.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
